CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Action And For Entry Of Judgment And For Failure To Amend; Memo P/A; Declaration
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle T. McGuinness, Attorney at Law, 415-398-3344, for defendant and moving party Wells Fargo Home Mortgage. No other appearances.

The moving party appeared and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE's Motion To Dismiss Action And For Entry Of Judgment And For Failure To Amend is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Continued To Apr-06-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHELLE MCGUINNESS OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. 677-5636 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as unopposed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)
